summary: Expanded the lbrefract header and moved a large amount of embedded assembly data/rodata/bss/sdata/sdata2 out of asm files into new .inc include files. The PR itself was closed unmerged, with the only visible comment saying it was merged into PR #440, so treat this as a staging PR rather than the final reviewed landing point.
what_changed: Added include/melee/lb/lbrefract.inc containing lbrefract-related data sections: .data, .rodata, .bss, .sdata, .sbss, and .sdata2.
Updated asm/melee/lb/lbrefract.s to include melee/lb/lbrefract.inc and removed the corresponding inline data block from the assembly file.
Expanded src/melee/lb/lbrefract.h with additional includes for baselib memory/pobj/tobj, GXMisc, OSCache, and string.h.
Replaced several vague or commented-out lbrefract declarations with concrete prototypes such as func_800222A4, func_8002247C(HSD_CObj *), func_800226A8(HSD_PObj *), and math helpers like atan2f.
Added temporary/local lbrefract callback declarations and RefractCallbackData scaffolding, explicitly marked with a comment: 'todo: locals to be removed'.
Split data tables and small-data constants out of Dolphin GX assembly files into .inc files, including GX.inc, GXAttr.inc, GXInit.inc, and GXMisc.inc.
Split OSCache data strings into include/dolphin/os/OSCache.inc and added src/dolphin/os/OSCache.h with a DCFlushRange(u8*, s32) prototype.

Removed broad placeholder declarations from include/functions.h where more specific headers or local scoping were being introduced, including removals around DCFlushRange and HSD_MemAlloc placeholders.
Changed some internal GX assembly labels from global func_* exports to local_* labels, e.g. func_8033D1B8 to local_8033D1B8 and func_8033D3E4 to local_8033D3E4.
smart_moves: Moving section data into per-module .inc files made the asm sources more focused on text while preserving exact binary layout through included data definitions.
The PR avoided leaving internal assembly helper labels exported as globals by renaming selected func_* symbols to local_* and updating branch targets accordingly.
lbrefract.h was made more self-contained by including the baselib and Dolphin headers needed by its prototypes instead of relying only on global include/functions.h declarations.
The OSCache DCFlushRange prototype was placed in a dedicated OSCache header, which is a better long-term home than a project-wide functions.h placeholder.

The lbrefract.inc data preserved recognizable strings such as LbRf.dat, lbRefData, refract_class_library, refract_dobj, refract_pobj, lbRefSetUnuse error!, and lbrefract.c, improving searchability for future decomp work.
decomp_lessons: When filling a module header, migrate only the declarations that the module actually needs into the closest domain header and remove corresponding generic placeholders from include/functions.h.

For asm files that still need exact data layout, per-module .inc files are useful intermediate artifacts: they keep section contents versioned and searchable without pretending the data has been fully typed in C.
Use local_* labels for assembly-only helper routines that should not be treated as public functions by later decomp work.
Strings and data table labels in .inc files can provide valuable anchors for reconstructing future typed structs and library metadata.

If callback signatures are uncertain, recording typed callback typedefs and a temporary struct can unblock matching, but mark them as temporary so future cleanups do not mistake them for final API knowledge.
naming_conventions: Internal assembly helpers were renamed from func_8033D1B8/func_8033D3E4 to local_8033D1B8/local_8033D3E4 when not intended as global exports.
lbrefract callback typedefs used descriptive temporary names RefractCallbackTypeA, RefractCallbackTypeB, and RefractCallbackTypeC.
The temporary struct name RefractCallbackData was used for callback plumbing, with unknown fields named unk0, unk1, etc.
Raw data labels in lbrefract.inc used address-derived names such as struct_803BB0B0, skip40_804336D0, str_0_804D3868, and lbl_804D7D70.
New include files followed module paths, e.g. include/melee/lb/lbrefract.inc, include/dolphin/gx/GXAttr.inc, and include/dolphin/os/OSCache.inc.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added .include directives at the top of asm files so section data could be maintained externally while text remained in the original asm file.
Moved .data jump tables and constants out of GX.s and GXAttr.s into module .inc files instead of deleting them outright.
Preserved section directives and alignment such as .section .data, .section .rodata, .section .bss, .section .sdata, .section .sbss, .section .sdata2, and .balign 8 in the new .inc files.
Kept decomp.me scratch links as comments near functions such as DCFlushRange and func_800222A4, indicating active matching experiments.
Removed .global directives from labels used as internal branch/jump-table targets where the diff showed they no longer needed external visibility.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the slice.
The only human text says: 'Merged into #440.' This explains why PR #438 is closed with merged_at null.
follow_up_queries: Inspect PR #440 for the final merged version and any review-driven corrections to the temporary lbrefract callback and struct declarations.
Check whether the duplicate callback_80021FB4 extern in lbrefract.h was corrected in the merged PR.
Verify RefractCallbackData field offsets and sizes before reusing the temporary struct as authoritative.
Search later history for conversion of include/melee/lb/lbrefract.inc data labels into typed C structs.
Compare OSCache.h and GX headers after PR #440 to see whether prototypes moved from include/functions.h into proper module headers.
